display.name: CI/CD Observability
display.description: Dashboard displaying metrics from CI and CD systems.

display.name: Change Age (avg)
display.description: Average time a change is in open state.

display.name: Change Approval Time (avg)
display.description: Average time taken to approve a change.

display.name: # Statuses
display.description: Number of pipeline runs grouped by status.

display.name: Branch Age (avg)
display.description: The average age of a branch.

display.name: # Lines changed
display.description: Number of lines changed in the given time period.

display.name: Change Merge Time (avg)
display.description: Average time taken to merge a change. This metric is a part of the larger Change Lead Time DORA metric.

display.name: # Changes
display.description: The number of changes by state. State can be open/closed/merged.

display.name: # Contributors
display.description: The number of contributors over time

display.name: # Branches (avg)
display.description: The average number of branches in the repository.

filter.expression: vcs.repository.name IN $repository.name cicd.pipeline.run.status EXISTS AND cicd.pipeline.name EXISTS
